positive: A minimalist, symmetrical portrait of a stylized celestial fox (kitsune) sitting amidst abstract swirling galaxies and constellations. The fox should have incredibly clean lines and a majestic silhouette, rendered in deep sapphire blue and brilliant gold ink tones against a void black background. Incorporate subtle watercolor washes of teal and lavender for depth. The composition must be highly graphic and centered, perfect for a distressed screen print texture, evoking a sense of mystery, magic, and elegance. Studio lighting setup with hard contrast.
negative: low detail, blurry, text, watermark, signature, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, color gradients, poor composition, logos, trademarks
